title: Der Luftpirat und sein lenkbares Luftschiff 66: Das Weltenfahrzeug zwischen den Riesen-Kometen
summaries: "Der Luftpirat und sein lenkbares Luftschiff 66: Das Weltenfahrzeug zwischen den Riesen-Kometen" is a science fiction novel written in the late 19th century. The book centers around a catastrophic event where a menacing comet threatens Earth, resulting in widespread panic and social upheaval. The main character, Kapitän Mors, is a mysterious air pirate who has developed a remarkable airship, which he uses to confront the impending disaster and restore order.  At the start of the story, chaos erupts in the city as the populace learns of the comet's imminent collision with Earth, leading to riots and rebellion against the ruling powers. The ruler, alongside his advisors, struggles with the growing unrest and the looming threat of the comet. Amidst this turmoil, Prince and the ruler consider seeking the help of the enigmatic Kapitän Mors, who may hold the key to averting the disaster. The tension mounts as the comet approaches, and the characters grapple with the dual threats of celestial annihilation and social collapse, setting the stage for Mors’ daring quest into the unknown.
